name: 7artisans Lens Photoelectric AF 85mm f/1.8
description: Compact and lightweight, the Sony E-mount 85mm f/1.8 AF Lens from 7artisans Photoelectric is a compact, lightweight prime designed for use with full-frame mirrorless or DSLR cameras.

features.Key Features: Full-Frame | f/1.8 to f/16 | Fast-Aperture Portrait Lens | Sharp Subject/Attractive Background Blur | 1 x Customizable Function Button | 2 x Aspherical Lens Elements | Silent, Precise STM Focus Motor | Multilayer Coatings with 11-Blade Iris | Works for Still and Video Capture | Compact, Lightweight Design | USB-C Port for Firmware Upgrades
features.What’s In The Box: 7artisans Photoelectric 85mm f/1.8 AF Lens (Sony E) | Front Lens Cap | Rear Lens Cap | Lens Hood | USB-C Cable
